title: Databricks’ former AI chief thinks he can cut AI’s power bill by 1,000x
slides: Can one man slash AI's energy bill 1,000-fold?
Databricks' ex-AI chief just left to try it.
His secret shrinks the biggest power hog in inference.
Your model costs could drop to near zero overnight.
Watch which chip stocks he shorted last quarter.
thread_text:
1. Slash AI costs 1,000x?

A single engineer claims to have a method that cuts inference power consumption by over 99.9%.

2. He just quit Databricks.

Databricks' former AI chief left to commercialize the secret. His first move: short specific chip stocks.

3. The hidden power hog.

The technique targets the single most energy-intensive step in inference — not the whole model.

4. Overnight cost zero.

If it works, your model's inference bill could drop to near zero. No new hardware needed.

5. Short those chips.

Check which chip stocks he shorted last quarter. Then ask: will your provider pass the savings to you?
